description: Legal declaration. Dating: refers to the year 4826 AM, which is 1065/66 CE. (The document itself may be later.) Concerning Nahray b. Nissim's occupancy of larger of his wife's family's house. Nahray sends two witnesses (the narrator and ʿAmmār b. Farrāḥ al-Iṭrābulsī) to his in-law Abū ʿAlī al-Kohen, promising to pay him 1 dinar per month for the part of the house which may exceed one sixth. (Information from Goitein's index card.)
description_he: הצהרה משפטית, מתייחסת לשנת 4826 (1065/66). נהריי בן נסים שולח שני עדים לחמיו אבו עלי הכהן: מתחייב לשלם דינר לחודש על חלק הבית שעולה על שישית.
